testcase.name: 026_v5_paper-nm_mcsolve.references.ipynb
testcase.failure:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- mc_sol = nm_mcsolve( [[H, A]], initial_state, tlist, ops_and_rates=[(sigmam(), gamma)], ntraj=1_000, options={"map": "parallel"}, seeds=0, ) #x1B[31m---------------------------------------------------------------------------#x1B[39m #x1B[31mPermissionError#x1B[39m Traceback (most recent call last) #x1B[36mCell#x1B[39m#x1B[36m #x1B[39m#x1B[32mIn[7]#x1B[39m#x1B[32m, line 1#x1B[39m #x1B[32m----> #x1B[39m#x1B[32m1#x1B[39m mc_sol = nm_mcsolve( #x1B[32m 2#x1B[39m [[H, A]], #x1B[32m 3#x1B[39m initial_state, #x1B[32m 4#x1B[39m tlist,

#x1B[36mFile #x1B[39m#x1B[32m~\miniconda3\envs\test-environment-v5\Lib\concurrent\futures\process.py:740#x1B[39m, in #x1B[36mProcessPoolExecutor.__init__#x1B[39m#x1B[34m(self, max_workers, mp_context, initializer, initargs, max_tasks_per_child)#x1B[39m #x1B[32m 728#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._cancel_pending_futures = #x1B[38;5;28;01mFalse#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 730#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# _ThreadWakeup is a communication channel used to interrupt the wait#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 731#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# of the main loop of executor_manager_thread from another thread (e.g.#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 732#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# when calling executor.submit or executor.shutdown). We do not use the#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m (...)#x1B[39m#x1B[32m 738#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# executor_manager_thread, since _ThreadWakeup.clear() is not protected#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 739#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# by a lock.#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m--> #x1B[39m#x1B[32m740#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._executor_manager_thread_wakeup = #x1B[30;43m_ThreadWakeup#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43m(#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43m)#x1B[39;49m #x1B[32m 742#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# Create communication channels for the executor#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 743#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# Make the call queue slightly larger than the number of processes to#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 744#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# prevent the worker processes from idling. But don't make it too big#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 745#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;66;03m# because futures in the call queue cannot be cancelled.#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 746#x1B[39m queue_size = #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._max_workers + EXTRA_QUEUED_CALLS
#x1B[36mFile #x1B[39m#x1B[32m~\miniconda3\envs\test-environment-v5\Lib\concurrent\futures\process.py:72#x1B[39m, in #x1B[36m_ThreadWakeup.__init__#x1B[39m#x1B[34m(self)#x1B[39m #x1B[32m 70#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._closed = #x1B[38;5;28;01mFalse#x1B[39;00m #x1B[32m 71#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._lock = threading.Lock() #x1B[32m---> #x1B[39m#x1B[32m72#x1B[39m #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._reader, #x1B[38;5;28mself#x1B[39m._writer = #x1B[30;43mmp#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43m.#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43mPipe#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43m(#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43mduplex#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43m=#x1B[39;49m#x1B[30;43;01mFalse#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[30;43m)#x1B[39;49m
